signals.headline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely, Boosting BTC to $77K; Ethereum and XRP Gain on Relief Rally | YES | HIGH conf
signals.raw:
Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely, Boosting BTC to $77K; Ethereum and XRP Gain on Relief Rally | YES | HIGH confidence** [5][2]

Bitcoin surged 2.2% to $77,541 on April 22, 2026, testing three-month highs after President Trump extended the U.S.-Iran ceasefire indefinitely, reducing macro tensions and enabling a breakout from a two-month consolidation range.[5][2] Ethereum rose 0.7% to $2,3
matched_markets: Will Trump agree to Iranian enrichment of uranium in April?
US x Iran diplomatic meeting by April 26, 2026?
